narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 2-B (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,108 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
